## Issue Template — Agent Builder Improvement

**Type**: [ ] Bug  [ ] Enhancement  [ ] Research Gap  [ ] Environment Error  [ ] Pattern Missing

**Summary**:
<!-- One sentence: what the problem is -->

**Context**:
<!-- Which task or build surfaced this? What was being built? -->

**Observed behavior**:
<!-- What happened -->

**Expected behavior**:
<!-- What should have happened -->

**Impact**:
<!-- How often does this come up? What does it cost when it happens? -->

**Proposed fix**:
<!-- If you have an idea, put it here. Otherwise leave blank. -->
